case_title: OSTERTAG JAMES J. VS CHU SAU TAM DBA. WONGS CLEANERS & LAUNDRY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY OSTERTAG JAMES J. AS TO DEFENDANT CHU SAU TAM DBA. WONGS CLEANERS & LAUNDRY WONG P.K. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-19-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
UNTIMELY SERVD, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR TO COURT DATE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSTERTAG JAMES J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHU SAU TAM DBA.
